title: Java 12 Experiments (Live Stream)
summary: In my first live stream ever (yay!), we explored Java 12's API improvements
content:
In my first live stream ever (yay!), we explored Java 12's API improvements

My first live stream! We dug around in Java 12, cataloging new features and experimenting with a few of them, most notably String::indent and transform, Collectors::teeing, and additions to CompletableFuture.

Thanks again to everyone who was there. 🙏 I had an amazing time.

Watch the video.
